title: CrewAI Subagent
description: Managed CrewAI sub-agent. Must be wired into a CrewAI Manager via the crewai channel.
Cannot be invoked directly, has no questions lane.

llm.description: LLM used by this sub-agent when delegated to

tool.description: Tools available to this sub-agent (via control-plane invoke)

instructions.title: Instructions
instructions.description: Additional instructions to guide this sub-agent when the Manager delegates to it.

advanced_mode.title: Advanced Mode
advanced_mode.description: Expose CrewAI Agent and Task configuration directly.

role.title: Role
role.description: Sub-agent role name (e.g. 'Financial Analyst'). The Manager uses this name when routing delegation. Maps to CrewAI Agent(role=...).

goal.title: Goal
goal.description: What this sub-agent aims to achieve when delegated to. Maps to CrewAI Agent(goal=...).

backstory.title: Backstory
backstory.description: Background context for this sub-agent's expertise. Helps the Manager and the sub-agent's own LLM reason about when it's the right choice. Maps to CrewAI Agent(backstory=...).

task_description.title: Task
task_description.description: What this sub-agent does when delegated to by the Manager. The user's request is passed as additional context at run time. Maps to CrewAI Task(description=...).

expected_output.title: Expected Output
expected_output.description: Description of the expected output format. Maps to CrewAI Task(expected_output=...).
